This game is excellent, great community! I love how it keeps up with all the updates!! I’m glad they don’t have mods because they’re aren’t any modders but we get free long arms! That’s such a good idea! Everyone is so nice and the moderators are always active making sure everything is good. Met tons of aa’s they are so nice!! 😊

Listen the game is good and all I mean the cosmetics are nice, the game feels like I actually got every cosmetics, it feels like it's the real thing. They even got a discord server and it's nice. But my problem is that one of the staff members said join the code sleepy543, of course, I joined. But I was talking to my mom and I turned down my headset volume. Then after I got done talking to her, I got banned, and it was because I was in metro, the easiest map in the game, and it looks cool with the pink sky. But he was counting down then banned me.  So I talk to them in discord and they said it's my fault. Listen I know I sound like a karen but how are you gonna ban someone for 5 days just because I was talking to someone. To make it worse, we just had a funeral for my grandma.  So I was already mad, then they had to make it worse. So if you want a actual good game that doesn't ban you for something stupid, I recommend super tag. This game is so unfair. Good game with bad rules.
